reasoning_content:
The user wants a JSON representation of the layout of the provided document image.
I need to identify the bounding boxes for all text elements and table structures.

1.  **Header Section:**
    *   "PRODUCT SPECIFICATION" at the top.
    *   A table containing metadata: Part Number, Rev, Date, Product Description, Page, Doc Number, Prepared, Checked, Approved.

2.  **Main Content Section:**
    *   "6.2 Mechanical Performance" heading.
    *   A table with columns: Test No, Item, Test Condition, Requirement.
    *   Rows containing specific test data (6.2.1, 6.2.2, 6.2.3, 6.2.4).

3.  **Footer Section:**
    *   Logo "GCT" and website "www.gct.co".

I will iterate through each element, determine its bounding box coordinates [ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax], and map it to the text content.
